1#pragma once
2
3#include "archetype.hpp"
4#include "scheduler/job.hpp"
5#include <vector>
6
7namespace world {
8
9template <typename... Ts> class Query {
10 public:
11 Query() {
12 m_inclusionFilter.m_bitset |= Archetype<Ts...>::signature.m_bitset;
13 };
14
15 ~Query() {};
16
17 // Modify existing query object in-place
18 template <typename... Is> Query<Ts...>& with() {
19 m_inclusionFilter.m_bitset |= Archetype<Is...>::signature.m_bitset;
20 return *this;
21 }
22 template <typename ...Es> Query<Ts...>& without() {
23 m_exclusionFilter.m_bitset |= Archetype<Es...>::signature.m_bitset;
24 return *this;
25 }
26
27 template <typename F> void run(F& f) {
28 scheduler::Task task(f);
29 }
30
31 private:
32 // Inefficent but Queries are cached.
33 Signature m_inclusionFilter;
34 Signature m_exclusionFilter;
35 // To be explanded by scheduler
36 std::vector<scheduler::Task> m_tasks;
37};
38} // namespace world``
